MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Mon, 11 Mar 2024 08:40:13 -0700
Subject: Kate, Princess of Wales, apologizes for editing family photo that fueled rumors about her health
Message-ID: <65ef25e0.050a0220.2197d.e8ecSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

            </tr>

                                    </td>
                                    
<td class="container GridSmall" width="295" height="240" style="background-color: #FFFFFF; vertical-align: top; ">

    <table width="295" height="100%" align="center" style="height: 100%; background-color: #FFFFFF; " cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0">
        <tbody>
            <tr height="160" style="box-shadow: 0px 5px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
                <td>
                    <a id="SmlArticleImg5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAACE6XCVE4XHOVU2VDQZ2FGNHX7M2XJXU4CNRKKCW6A3R2EGAM467CBEDG7BSQPTY6W5OLOEI2CEI2OLRRRHIFTXQAURSBWRZX6GUQ2O25JTXW57V7E3FBEJZ76CBMEDKGVILCSZXERDPKOLYQKS2GX5IKDVGJFD3OJNJ5D6A673RKDQ2EGFSI&" target="_blank">
                        <img width="295" height="160" style="border: none; display: block; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0px;" src="https://th.bing.com/th?id=ORMS.7c4b355ad4c4c850d2eb34ca75bcae1f&pid=Wdp&w=295&h=160&dpr=1&c=8&rs=2">
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr style="height: 100%;">
                <td style="padding: 10px 10px 0px 10px; font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #333333; text-decoration: none; vertical-align: top; background-color: #FFFFFF;" width="295" height="40">
                    <a id="SmlArticleTitle5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAADZE4DD4XA5CAZDEAKCWH5XY2VV2HMJNST3AIWMBXJTYPKFW2KHLVNV5PKH5VAPOXJD2LO2RW5F6MP6BZW44FAVWQ3K3IJDQOCRKYUVKFLASPKVN6EUXLJNA7LPJ5PUVJMKWYNX2XNI2TZEFJP5JRBZRM5SIBDP4LGHBQIK25SVCVU3C6UYYR&" target="_blank">
                        The Best, Worst, and Most Memorable Moments of the 2024 Oscars
                    </a>
                </td>
            </tr>

            <tr height="35">
                <td align="left">
                    <table style="margin: 5px 0px 8px 10px;">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                    <td height="45" style="padding-right: 12px; padding-top: 5px">

                                        </a>
                                    </td>
                                <td height="45" style="font-family: Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;color: #666666; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; line-height: 20px; height: 20px; border: none;">
                                    <a id="SmlArticlePubName5" style="color: #333333;border: none;text-decoration: none;" href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?&d=AIAAC7LORWYWDPKQF2SQAWKZRFMYWVOXCMZDC3OCUCPLLUHCVYQT2OXTY4BVTYYGEHGVQIRRRXJTAGZQ7YJJM7OXXYC2NPYOOTKTFHUSME455JJXB6DTR3RBPQJGGNUZHDSUAGREH2RGIXF3MZHVYCGKBABD5BXEJF262PQOOEVMRLQN6J4MCSGD&" target="_blank">

                                    </a>

</td>

                        </td>
                    </tr>

                    <tr>

<tr>
    <td align="center">
        <br>
        <div align="center" style="font-family:Segoe UI,Helvetica,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size: 20px; font-weight:normal;">
